_meta.purpose: Deterministic, KEYLESS, LIST-BASED classification for the two THEMATIC instruments (EU Open Source Strategy -> 'Open source', Strategic Roadmap for Digitalisation & AI in Energy -> 'AI in energy'). A company is classified iff it appears in a roster's APPROVED members[]. No model calls, no keyword-guessing of themes.
_meta.why_lists: Membership is the credibility line: 'included because it is a smartEn member / Eclipse member / IPCEI participant' is a citable, falsifiable claim.
_meta.tag_vs_primary: Membership never auto-recategorizes. sync_universe.py: sector hit -> sector is PRIMARY, roster becomes an affiliations[] tag; member with no sector hit & market_cap_eur <= CAP_EUR (20e9) -> thematic primary; > CAP_EUR diversified -> tag-only; private/foundation -> static non-listed thematic entry.
_meta.pipeline: scripts/fetch_rosters.py (weekly, automated) fetches each roster's `fetch` source KEYLESS and writes the STAGING file data/roster_candidates.json — it NEVER edits this file or the universe. A human reviews staging and runs scripts/approve_roster.py to move approved entries into members[] below (stamping last_checked). classify_theme.py reads ONLY the approved members[]. The fetch is automated + repeatable; the approval is the one deliberate manual gate that keeps thematic entries citable.
_meta.fetch_types: json_api (parse a JSON members endpoint) · wp_cpt (WordPress REST custom-post-type) · prose (HTML/PDF press text -> candidate names, ALWAYS status:needs-review) · unavailable (no keyless source found — logged, never scraped/guessed).

disabled_rosters.disabled: HTTP 404 — no EU-scoped members directory (only global members.linuxfoundation.org, not EU/EEA-filterable). Dropped 2026-06-08.

fetch.reason: No member custom-post-type in wp-json; members rendered as page assets — not keyless-parseable (checked 2026-06-09).

rosters.scope: EU/EEA demand-side flexibility, DER and smart-grid software members
EU/EEA companies named as IPCEI participants touching energy digitalisation

rosters.list: EU Digitalisation & AI in Energy roadmap — named organisations
rosters.scope: organisations explicitly named in the roadmap / its annexes

AI in energy.notes: ENTSO-E membership is national TSOs (not listed software vendors) — deliberately not used; smartEn is the right software/flexibility roster.
